subparts.text: What is Creative Advertising Marketing? Give one real-world example. 1
Explain the difference between POS Data and Market Basket Data. 1
What do you understand by the phrase "Data is Gold" in retail analytics? 2
Define Market Basket Analysis with an example. 2
Define Retailer Goodwill and state its importance in building customer loyalty. 3
What is Cross-Selling in retail and how does it improve sales? 3
Write a short note on Real Estate Site Selection Modelling. 4
Mention any two features of Just-in-Time in retail logistics. 4

questions.question_text: Elaborate on the importance of strategic marketing and operations marketing in the context of retail analytics. Support your answer with suitable examples. 1
Differentiate between House Brands and Name Brands. Also, explain how Celebrity Marketing can influence brand preference using a real- life retail case. 1

A retailer has 5 transactions. Using the Apriori algorithm, identify all frequent 1-itemsets and 2-itemsets with a minimum support threshold of 60%. Transaction ID Items Purchased 1 Milk, Bread, Butter 2 Milk, Bread 3 Milk, Butter 4 Bread, Butter 5 Milk, Bread, Butter 2
Define Market Basket Analysis and describe how Market basket Analysis is used to identify product relationships. Give examples with help of real life retail enterprises 2
What is Trade Area Modelling? How does geography affect site selection in retail planning? A retailer is choosing between two locations. Explain using the factor rating method. 3

A retailer is selecting between two locations using the factor rating method. Use the table below and recommend the better location. Factor Weight Location A Location B Cost 0.4 8 7 Customer Accessibility 0.35 9 8 Competition Level 0.25 6 7 3
Discuss the role of store design, visual merchandising, and loyalty programs in enhancing in-store customer experience. 4
Explain the concept of Merchandise Mix Modelling. How does combining data from various sources improve in-store presentation and marketing? 4
